description:
Note：
Non-Apple branded products,Compatible with iPhone models

Overview
Firstly, charging/data transfer cables are a pain. Why? Most of the time, you lose them… if not, they get easily damaged or worse… totally destroyed. And this is after a very short usage time. These cables may seem cheap but in the long run, they cost you hundreds of dollars...
Well, that’s about to change with the 360 Degree Magnetic Charging Cable.
It’s a multi-function cable that’s super durable and compatible with any devices. You can use it as a charging cable… and a smart one at that! It uses a proprietary smart chip that keeps the voltage stable and prevents your phone from overcharging so you know your phone is always safe.
THIS IS THE FIRST EVER 360 ROTATING MAGNETIC CHARGING CABLE DESIGNED WITH A 90-DEGREE CONNECTOR WHICH ALLOWS YOU TO HOLD YOUR PHONE IN ANY POSITION WHILE CHARGING IT, SAYING BYE TO MORE BROKEN CABLES UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES!
Product features: strong magnetic, blind magnetic automatic calibration docking for charging, greatly reducing the damage caused by the number of plugging and unplugging the mobile phone charging interface, magnetic line 1 times = traditional N times, the plug does not need to be pulled down, can be used as a dust plug Protect the role of the phone,
One-handed operation of the mobile phone does not require a traditional one-handed mobile phone. The data cable needs to be aligned with the jack, so that you can enjoy the pleasant mood and operation experience in various occasions such as driving journey and playing games!

Specification
Product Name: L-type (elbow) fast charge magnetic data line (maximum current 3 amps)
Product features: fast charging + data transmission (only data transmission supports fast charging)
Applicable devices: Android / iOS / TYPE-C
Product material: aluminum alloy, TPE, copper core, LED light
Copper wire: 55*0.1*2C+10*0.1*2C (pure copper)
Current: The maximum current of the Android interface can exceed 2.1A, the maximum current of the Apple interface can exceed 2.1A, and the current of the Type C interface can exceed 3A. (The above depends on the charging head and the corresponding mobile phone.)
Product color: black, red
Product length: 1 meter

Package Content
1 * Magnetic Cable
